nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: My friend, hello. I am Guo Jing, currently studying military strategy and Go here.

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: You look travel-worn. What brings you here?

options.text: I've long admired Hero Guo!
I'd like to learn Go from Hero Guo
Hero Guo, I'd like to hear more of your teachings
Just passing by

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: You look travel-worn. Have you come to Xiangyang to challenge masters in Go?

options.text: Exactly! I've long admired Hero Guo
I'd like to learn Go from Hero Guo
Just passing by

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: Good! I have a skill called 'Ventriloquism Transmission' - it allows silent communication during Go matches, which can confuse your opponent!

options.text: Sounds amazing! Please teach me!
How does this help in Go?

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: In Go matches, you can use this skill to silently transmit your intent, making your opponent unable to predict your next move. It reduces their analysis time by 20%!

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: This skill requires reaching level 3 to master. Come back when you're ready!

options.text: I'm already level 3!
I'll work hard to level up!

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: Good! You have sufficient foundation. Now I'll teach you 'Ventriloquism Transmission'!

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: You've learned 'Ventriloquism Transmission'! Use it well. When you reach level 5, I'll teach you more advanced techniques!

options.text: Thank you, Hero Guo!

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: Good! As the saying goes, 'Iron pestle ground into a needle' - with diligent practice, you'll surely succeed!

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: I can teach you some military strategy and special Go techniques. But you must have sufficient foundation - at least level 3!

options.text: I'm ready to learn!
What other skills do you have?

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: Besides 'Ventriloquism Transmission', I also know the 'Eighteen Palms of Subduing Dragons' and strategic techniques for defending cities. But those require higher levels to learn!

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: Defending the country is everyone's duty. Practice your skills well - one day, you might help defend Xiangyang too!

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: Feel free to walk around. Xiangyang welcomes all righteous heroes!

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: I see you've reached level 5! How about a Go match to test your skills?

options.text: I'd be honored to learn from you, Hero Guo!
Let me prepare more first.

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: Good! Let's begin. I'll use a 7x7 board - don't worry, I'll go easy on you!

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: No problem. Come challenge me anytime when you're ready!

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: Excellent! Your Go skills are remarkable. Here's a secret manual I've treasured - use it well!

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: You're too kind. Though I have some martial arts foundation, when it comes to Go, Rong'er is far superior.

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: Rong'er often says Go is like commanding troops - you must understand when reality and illusion interweave, balance offense and defense. These years defending Xiangyang, I've gained some insights on this.

options.text: Please share your wisdom
I'd like to challenge Hero Guo's Go skills

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: I may be slow-witted, but thanks to my teachers and Rong'er, I've learned some skills. Since you sincerely seek knowledge, I'll teach you everything I know.

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: Defending a city is like defending in Go - you must know where to hold firm and where you can sacrifice. I have a technique called 'Ventriloquism Transmission' that can get you expert guidance at critical moments.

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: This technique actually asks an AI expert to advise you, like having Rong'er guide me. Remember, true masters can't just rely on external help - you must trust your own judgment.

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: The path of Go is long and requires daily accumulation. You can exchange pointers with masters from various places - you'll surely benefit.

options.text: Thank you for your guidance, Hero Guo!
I'd like to play a game with Hero Guo

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: Good! You have ambition! But I've been busy with official duties lately - I'll have time once Xiangyang's defenses are properly arranged.

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: You should practice more first. When your Go skills improve to a certain level, we'll play a game, how about that?

options.text: Alright, I'll work hard!
I'm ready now!

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: Yes, young people should have this drive! Go ahead, when you've made progress, come find me anytime.

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: Oh? You carry yourself well - your Go skills must have a solid foundation. Good, let's play a game!

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: Xiangyang City is strategically important. In recent years, Mongol soldiers have invaded - the situation is tense. If you're just traveling, please be careful.

options.text: Thank you for the warning, farewell
Actually, I'd like to learn Go

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: No need for courtesy. For country and people - that's the great chivalry. Learning Go is the same - it can't be just for personal victory, you must have higher pursuits.

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: You've learned 'Ventriloquism Transmission' - this is a technique Rong'er taught me. But remember, true masters must rely on their own judgment, can't always depend on others.

options.text: I've learned so much!
I'd like to hear Hero Guo's strategic insights

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: Military strategy says: Know yourself and your enemy, and you'll never lose. Go is the same. You must be clear about your advantages and your opponent's weaknesses to formulate the best strategy.

options.text: Thank you for your guidance!

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: You've completed all quests - your martial arts and Go skills have improved greatly. Xiangyang City needs young people like you! But remember, martial arts and Go have no end - you must continue working hard.

options.text: Thank you for your cultivation, Hero Guo!
I'd like to hear more of Hero Guo's experience

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: Take care! Xiangyang City always welcomes you. If you have time, let's discuss Go again!
